title: senecio × dominii
intro: Senecio × dominii, also known as Jacob's Ladder or Senecio, is a hybrid species of flowering plant belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, Senecio × dominii has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects, which help to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant is rich in sesquiterpene lactones, which have been shown to have potential health benefits, including antioxidant, anti-cancer, and antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, Senecio × dominii is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
